name: Lichees Sorbet
recipeInstructions:
1. Puree the lichees fruit in a blender.
2. Add the sugar and orange juice to the pureed lichees and freeze according to the ice-cream maker's instructions.
3. In another blender, puree the raspberries.
4. Strain the raspberry puree through a fine-mesh strainer into a small bowl.
5. Mix in the sugar for the raspberry sauce.
6. Refrigerate until ready to serve.
7. To serve, make a pool of raspberry sauce on a plate and add the sorbet in the center.
